## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-reviewed my code
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
